name: cv-builder-monorepo
description: A modern CV Builder application with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.build: npm run client:build && npm run server:build
scripts.client:start: cd client && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.server:build: cd server && echo 'No build step required for server'
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install

author: CV Builder Team
